raw_consumer_statement: I noticed a charge of {$190.00} on my American Express statement for XXXX XXXX on the date XX/XX/2026. I did not make this charge. I am not the passenger listed on the ticket. I have filed disputes with both American Express and XXXX XXXX. Both keep closing my disputes saying it is a valid charge. I have had possession of my card the entire time so I did not report it stolen. They are refusing to treat this as the fraud that it is.
